title: Runner package export boundary lane precheck
delta_summary: local package initializer exposes stable runner public surface and lazy-loads AgentRunner symbols
`__getattr__` guard avoids import-cycle during package init

risk_signals.evidence: lazy AgentRunner export in __getattr__ is an intentional cycle-avoidance mechanism
risk_signals.impact: upstream replay can reintroduce import-cycle regressions during runner package initialization

planned_validation: uv run --package framework python - <<'PY' ... import framework.runner export check ... PY
decision_gate: prefer keep_local if lazy export boundary remains required and runner/session bundles are green
